title: NixOS: A Different Way to Think About Your System
description: How a purely functional Linux distribution challenges everything you know about package management and system configuration.

title: How GPUs Actually Work
description: A deep dive into GPU architecture — from shader cores and warp scheduling to memory hierarchies and why they're so good at parallel computation.

title: Programming Paradigms: Beyond Object-Oriented
description: An exploration of functional, logic, and declarative paradigms — and why knowing more than one way to think about code makes you a better programmer.
